title: Well-formed phased migration — correct 5-phase zero-downtime pattern
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements the 5-phase zero-downtime pattern: (1) additive nullable column with INSTANT, (2) PK-range backfill, (3) app dual-write deploy, (4) constraint enforcement with INPLACE, (5) cleanup in separate release. Session guards present on all DDL statements.
